title: Mount geometry authority router (CI-RED-015-H)
intent: Close CI-RED-015-H: register the ratified C2-A / CAM 7T geometry-authority router in the CAM router manifest so the characterized /api/cam/geometry-authority/* route tests stop 404'ing. Implementation-phase wiring of a ratified narrow-authority surface; no new authority decision.

diff_articulation.what_changed: cam_manifest.py: add one RouterSpec for app.routers.cam.geometry_authority_router with prefix="" (the router declares its full /api/cam/geometry-authority prefix internally), tags [CAM, Geometry, Authority], category cam. C2A_GEOMETRY_AUTHORITY_PACKET.md: correct the stale creation-time Packet-Identity 'Status | DRAFT' field to the accurate partial-ratification status (narrow authority decisions RATIFIED per §18.3; geometry-origin OPEN) with a pointer to the authoritative C2_STATUS_RECONCILIATION_2026-06-23.md.
diff_articulation.why_not_redundant: The router module, its endpoints, and its test suite already existed but the router was never registered in any manifest, so all 10 TestGeometryAuthorityRouter HTTP routes 404'd. This single RouterSpec is the only thing that mounts them; without it the route witness cannot exercise the contract surface. The packet edit is not cosmetic either: it removes a real internal contradiction (header RATIFIED vs identity-table DRAFT) that has existed unchanged since the file's only commit (c597c8a7, 2026-05-18), aligning the packet with the governing reconciliation snapshot.

commands_run: services/api .venv pytest tests/cam/test_geometry_authority_references.py -q -> 100 passed (the 10 TestGeometryAuthorityRouter HTTP tests flip 404->green; no downstream validate_reference KeyError, so no broadening per AC#3)
confirmed pytest imported the worktree manifest via cam_manifest.__file__

governance gate grounded against docs/governance/C2_STATUS_RECONCILIATION_2026-06-23.md: C2-A narrow authority RATIFIED (§18.3); geometry-origin OPEN; router mounts ratified surface and does not decide geometry origin

files.intent: Register the ratified geometry-authority router so its /api/cam/geometry-authority routes mount
files.behavior_change: runtime - 10 previously-404 /api/cam/geometry-authority routes now serve; no execution or machine-output authorized (router- and model-level invariants enforced)

files.intent: Correct stale DRAFT identity field to accurate partial-ratification status per the authoritative reconciliation
